{{Infobox group
| name = Li clan
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Li clan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Li]] clan is a family based in [[Sacred Valley]], known for their sophisticated and ostentatious displays of wealth and status. They are characterized by a penchant for showmanship, often utilizing musical performances and colorful [[Remnants]]—such as silver butterflies, [[Jade{{!}}jade]] hawks, and crimson eagles—to announce their arrivals. Their members frequently wear extravagant jewelry, with high-ranking [[Jade]] elders adorning themselves in numerous gold and silver rings and gems. This habit of vanity has led other groups, such as the [[Wei clan]], to view them as arrogant. Historically, the [[Li]] clan was once a major power, but they have since fallen out of the top ten families in the valley. Despite this decline, they maintain significant assets, including a large number of flying chariots and clouds. Their territory features an artistic perimeter wall made of polished wood decorated with serpent-like [[Script{{!}}script]]. The clan's leadership includes a [[Jai Matriarch{{!}}Matriarch]] and various elders, such as the Fourth Elder. Notable figures associated with their lineage include [[Shao]], an expert [[Forger]], and the [[Grand Elder]] [[Li Markuth]]. The clan has also been linked to the presence of an ancient, powerful [[Grand Patriarch]] whose return caused significant alarm.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan]] has not made any motion to improve its strength before the [[Festival]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan]]'s color in the arena is green and gray.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan]] has experts and a [[Grand Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan{{!}}Li Clan]] is led by [[Grand Patriarch]] [[Li Markuth]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Grand Patriarch]] of the [[Li clan{{!}}Li Clan]] summoned dark clouds.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] is a group [[Lindon]] needs to visit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] is located to the south of the valley.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] is surrounded by a wall of smooth, pale, polished wood decorated with functional [[Script{{!}}script]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] is led by a [[Jai Matriarch{{!}}Matriarch]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] participated in the [[Seven-Year Festival]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] has a Fourth Elder.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] has wooden walls.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] was not as bad as [[Lindon]] had said.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A man from the [[Li clan]] collapsed with [[blood]] running from his eyes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Wei Shi Jaran{{!}}Jaran]] has an acid burn from the [[Li clan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Li clan]] has a Grand [[Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] is the [[Grand Elder]] of the [[Li clan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Li clan]] has [[Elders]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Li clan]] is no longer among the top ten families in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“The Li clan has made no motion to improve its strength before the Festival, and that worries me most of all.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“The Matriarch has arrived,” one of the guards announced from the top of the wall<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
